column2: Message B2B Agent to Notify of PO Error
column3: Outreach the assigned B2B agent/BAM on the order in Slack to notify them that the PO cannot be fulfilled as is, and requires cancellation.
Please wait for B2B response and acknowledgement of cancellation Note : If no response from B2B within 24 natural hours (except for outreach sent on Friday) please proceed to step 3.
Enter the PO or OPID# into the Bulk Order Cancellation tool to cancel the replacement PO. Note : Be sure to select email notifications for the supplier and customer so they are notified.
Refresh the cancellation results to confirm the PO has been cancelled successfully.
Respond to the supplier utilizing the Original B2B Order template, and close the ticket under a Done resolution.
